backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining hostel data types (Hostel, Category, RoomSharing), managing a Map of hostels with CRUD operations, initializing 12 sample hostels, and including blob storage mixin for image handling.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four completed features: Privacy page, Disclaimer page, routing for both pages in App.tsx, and footer links in Layout.tsx, all with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality, props, and integration points.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with warm terracotta, sage, and amber tones, plus base styling for body and borders.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'Hostel Finder' title, root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for home, hostel detail, add hostel, edit hostel, privacy, and disclaimer pages, all wrapped in Layout component with type-safe router configuration.
Collapsible filter component with price range inputs (min/max), room sharing type checkboxes, active filter count badge, and clear all functionality.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter buttons for All, Girls, Boys, and Co-Living with icons, active state styling using gradient backgrounds, and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/HostelCard.tsx: Displays a hostel card with image, category badge, address, contact, description, and price range; navigates to hostel detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/HostelGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of HostelCard components with loading spinner and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/HostelMap.tsx: Creates a visual placeholder map with hostel markers positioned in a grid pattern, showing hostel details on hover (no actual mapping library integration).
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Image carousel component with navigation arrows, thumbnails, and counter for browsing hostel images.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header (logo, navigation), footer (copyright, links, caffeine.ai attribution), and outlet for page content.
frontend/src/components/MapLocationPicke: Google Maps integration component with place autocomplete search, clickable map, and draggable marker for selecting hostel location coordinates.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input field with search icon and clear button for filtering hostels by name or address.
frontend/src/components/SortControls.tsx: Dropdown select component for sorting hostels by price, name, or location in ascending/descending order.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMutations.ts: Defines React Query mutations for adding and updating hostels, automatically invalidating relevant queries on success to refresh the UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching hostels (all, by category, or by ID) from the backend actor with proper dependency management.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm color palette (terracotta, sage, amber) for light and dark themes, including category-specific colors for girls/boys/coliving hostels.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddHostel.tsx: Form page for adding new hostels with fields for name, category, description, address (with map picker), room sharing options with prices, and owner contact, including validation and submission via useAddHostel mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Static page displaying legal disclaimer content covering liability limitations, user-generated content, third-party links, and terms of use for the Hostel Finder platform.
frontend/src/pages/EditHostel.tsx: Page component for editing hostel room capacity and pricing details with form validation, state management for 5 sharing/price pairs, and navigation back to hostel detail view after successful update.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main homepage component that displays hostel listings with category filtering (girls/boys/co-living), search, price range filters, sharing type filters, sorting options, and both grid and map views.
frontend/src/pages/HostelDetail.tsx: Hostel detail page showing image gallery, category badge, room sharing options with pricing, map location, contact information, and edit button with fallback images based on hostel category.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Static privacy policy page explaining data collection, usage, storage on Internet Computer blockchain, user rights, third-party services, and contact information.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, warm hospitality-focused palette, category-specific colors, custom animations, and shadcn/ui integration.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking hostel listing website features including category filtering, map integration, image hosting, manual entry forms, edit functionality, and privacy/legal pages.
